summary: EXP-294 closes WIN-036.c5 hole #1 (MAJOR, third consecutive cycle): the cross-page OTS-canary tension between the Timestamp Error tab in build-scripts/generate-html.js and the harmonized WIN-035–039 / part1 / part6 / part8 prose. Decision: Option A (update Timestamp Error tab prose to acknowledge that status_history.json per-domain bundles prediction-side fields alongside observation-side fields), grounded in EXP-290's 2026-05-06 audit of the live file (587 entries, 39-domain latest snapshot, cited examples confirming formula+predicted+tolerance_pct+source AND observed+error_pct+pass per domain per commit). Three exact-replacement patches against build-scripts/generate-html.js (P1 scorecard ~line 1822, P2 main paragraph ~line 1832, P3 WIN-035-039 bullet ~line 1888) — substring counts re-verified 2026-05-08 as count=1 each on current origin/main HEAD. Replacement strings reuse EXP-290 P6/P7/P8 audit-grounded text that was stranded when ISS-1867's data/wins.json-scoped verifier closed without touching build-scripts/generate-html.js. EXP-294 verified post-hoc that part1/part6/part8 in data/sections.json are ALREADY harmonized to the EXP-290 framing (legacy 'These are observations — the outcomes' phrase appears at exactly one location: build-scripts/generate-html.js:1832); only the Timestamp Error tab is the residual unharmonized surface. After decider self-apply: run `node build.js html` then `tests/run.sh` per CLAUDE.md, then close ISS-1875. Recommended verification grep: `grep -lE 'These are observations — the outcomes|observed values, pass/fail audit results, statistical comparisons. This is the' build-scripts/generate-html.js data/sections.json data/wins.json` should return zero matches post-patch.
decider_notes: Mechanical text-only patch. No verdicts, code_analysis tags, or numerical claims touched. Single-file build-scripts/generate-html.js edit. Tests should pass post-build with no DATA-blob changes — only generated HTML prose. The April-2026 Update block in the Timestamp Error tab (already mentions 'the only OpenTimestamps anchor on the site is still the one on status_history.json') is consistent with EXP-294's framing and does not need updating.
